channel.title: Notepad++ on MarkJacobsen.net
channel.description: Recent content in Notepad++ on MarkJacobsen.net

item.title: Access a Console (including CYGWIN) from Notepad++
item.description:
If youŌĆÖre regularly in Notepad++ you may find the NPPConsole to be a huge help. With it you can access a windows console or even cygwin if you prefer (I do). To get startedŌĆ”

  1. Download the NPPConsole Plugin
  2. Extract the dll to your n++/plugins directory
  3. Restart Notepad++ if it was already running
  4. Use the Plugin Manager to make sure the plugin is available

If you want to just use the Windows console (DOS) you should be all set. To integrate with CYGWINŌĆ”

item.title: Remove Duplicate Lines in Notepad++
item.description:
If youŌĆÖve ever had the need to remove the duplicate lines from a long list of entries like soŌĆ”

hi
bye
hi
guy
bye
hi

ŌĆ” and are looking for thisŌĆ”

hi
bye
guy

You can use the find/replace feature in Notepad++ to do it if you use the regex funcationality. HereŌĆÖs the find stringŌĆ”

^(.*?)$\s+?^(?=.*^\1$)

Just replace with a zero length string.

If youŌĆÖd like to read up on the details I found this tip herePlease remember to subscribe to the newsletter or feed to stay up to date!
